footer.copyright: Every story is a new adventure.

hero.description: AI magic transforms your photos into beautiful illustrated storybooks. Turn bedtime into a journey through space, enchanted forests, and legendary kingdoms.
hero.story_quote: "Leo's Space Mission — a gift that turned him into a real astronaut."

gallery.title: Choose Your Next Adventure
gallery.subtitle: A collection of magical stories waiting for your little hero
gallery.book1_desc: Discover distant planets and become the galaxy's guardian in this cosmic adventure.
gallery.book2_desc: Search for hidden treasures and meet the wonderful creatures of the forest.
gallery.book3_desc: Dive into the ocean's depths and uncover the secrets of forgotten underwater kingdoms.
gallery.book4_desc: Be the brave knight who saves the kingdom in a classic fantasy tale.

how_it_works.title: How Does It Work?
how_it_works.subtitle: Creating a lasting memory takes just three magical steps. No artistic skills required — just a little imagination.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Upload your child's photos and let our magic recognize their unique features.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Space adventures, enchanted forests, or classic knight tales.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Instant preview, worldwide shipping, and a memory that lasts forever.

testimonials.title: What Parents Say
testimonials.subtitle: Success stories from families who experienced the magic with us.
testimonials.review1_text: "I couldn't believe my eyes when I saw my daughter in the story! It was truly magical, and now she won't sleep without hugging her personalized book."
testimonials.review2_text: "The best gift I ever gave my son. The image quality is stunning, as if drawn by a world-class artist. Thank you Hawadeet for this brilliant idea."
testimonials.review3_text: "The details in the story are amazing — my child's name and hobbies were woven in brilliantly. I recommend every parent try this magic."

bento.art_desc: Every illustration blends AI precision with curated human artistry, ensuring your child appears naturally and heroically on every page.
bento.ai_desc: We write the story specifically around your child's name and favorite things.
bento.shipping_desc: We ship premium books to more than 50 countries.

cta_section.title: Ready to Start the Adventure?
cta_section.subtitle: Create a digital preview in less than 60 seconds. Free to try, magical to keep.
